nasb.text: You divided the sea before them, So they passed through the midst of the sea on dry ground; And their pursuers You hurled into the depths, Like a stone into raging waters.

esv.text: And you divided the sea before them, so that they went through the midst of the sea on dry land, and you cast their pursuers into the depths, as a stone into mighty waters.

cnv.text: 你又在我們的列祖面前把海分開， 使他們在海中的乾地上走過去； 把追趕他們的人丟在深處， 好像石頭拋進怒海之中。

ccb.text: 你在我们祖先面前把海水分开，使他们在海中走干地过去；你把追赶他们的人扔进深海，好像把石头扔进大水中。
